item.title: Himalaya Exfoliante Facial Cúrcuma Antimanchas Exfolia y Mejora la Textura de la Piel 75ml Paquete de 1 Curcuma
item.description:
Ahora mismo tienes Himalaya Exfoliante Facial Cúrcuma Antimanchas Exfolia y Mejora la Textura de la Piel 75ml Paquete de 1 Curcuma en el siguiente enlace!

🔎:

  • PHYTO VITAMIN COMPLEX - sinergia de CURCUMA, REGALIZ y NIACINAMIDA para maximizar el efecto iluminador de la piel
  • TODOS LOS TIPOS DE MANCHAS OSCURAS: manchas solares, manchas de envejecimiento, manchas postacné
  • Fórmula ligera, de rápida absorción y que no mancha.
  • PIEL MÁS CLARA DESPUÉS DEL 1ER USO; EXFOLIA; MEJORA LA TEXTURA DE LA PIEL
  • CÚRCUMA PRENSADA EN FRÍO, DE ORIGEN ORGÁNICO; 97% de ingredientes de origen natural; 100% reciclable; clínicamente testado.

🛒 Visítala!!!

item.title: Himalaya Botanique Simply Mint Complete Care Toothpaste| Refreshing Mint Flavour | Strong Teeth | Healthy Gums and anti-inflammatory | Fresh Breath -150g Pack of 2
item.description:
Ahora mismo tienes Himalaya Botanique Simply Mint Complete Care Toothpaste| Refreshing Mint Flavour | Strong Teeth | Healthy Gums and anti-inflammatory | Fresh Breath -150g Pack of 2 en el siguiente enlace!

🔎:

  • Mints antibacterial properties help to eliminate bad odour and and prevent cavities. Mint also leaves behind a cooling sensation and imparts fresh breath.
  • ALL NATURAL FLUORIDE FREE TOOTHPASTE: Neem and Triphala clean teeth and give this formulation its ability to remove plaque and surface stains. They work to keep the mouth clean and give you a natural radiant smile.
  • This invigorating blend of Neem, Pomegranate and Mint will leave behind a cooling sensation on the tongue and gums, creating a refreshing, soothing feeling while removing bacteria,supportting your oral health and stopping bad breath.
  • ANTI-OXIDANT: Pomegranate, which is an astringent fruit extract, helps support healthy-looking gums by tightening the tissues. This natural toothpaste helps reduce and prevent bleeding gums, gum inflammations, and other dental problems.
  • NO ARTIFICIAL INGREDIENTS: NO Fluoride, NO Sodium Lauryl Sulfate (SLS), NO Carrageenan. NO harsh abrasives, yet it tastes and foams wonderfully.

🛒 Visítala!!!

item.title: Himalaya Mancha oscura Claro Espumoso lavado de cara 150ml
item.description:
En este momento está Himalaya Mancha oscura Claro Espumoso lavado de cara 150ml en el siguiente enlace!

🔎:

  • REDUCE VISIBLEMENTE LAS MANCHAS OSCURAS; POTENCIA LA LUMINOSIDAD DE LA PIEL
  • TODOS TIPOS DE MANCHAS OSCURAS: manchas solares, manchas de la edad, manchas del acné
  • CÚRCUMA PRENSADA EN FRÍO, DE ORIGEN ORGÁNICO; 97 % de ingredientes de origen natural
  • COMPLEJO FITOVITAMÍNICO - una combinación perfecta de CÚRCUMA, REGALIZ y NIACINAMIDA para potenciar la luminosidad de la piel
  • PARA TODO TIPO DE PIELES; fórmula ligera, de rápida absorción y que no mancha; clínica y dermatológicamente comprobada

item.title: Himalaya Active white Gel | Herbal toothpaste with fruit enzymes |Teeth whitening |Anti bacterial |Paraben and bleach Free|100% vegetarian-75ml Pack of 3
item.description:
Tienes Himalaya Active white Gel | Herbal toothpaste with fruit enzymes |Teeth whitening |Anti bacterial |Paraben and bleach Free|100% vegetarian-75ml Pack of 3 en el siguiente enlace!

ℹ️:

  • Free of chemical bleach and parabens | 100% vegetarian product
  • PROTECTS GUMS - with Miswak and natural astringents which ensure your gums and enamel remain healthy and protected. It Soothes the gums and makes them stronger.
  • PLANT ENZYMES TECHNOLOGY - which gently remove surface discoloration on teeth within two weeks, leaving your teeth whiter and shiny and long-lasting, fresh breath. Traditional herbs in toothpaste have been used for centuries to care for the oral cavity, helping to maintain healthy teeth and gums.
  • CRUELTY FREE: We care about our furry friends That’s why we never test our personal care products on animals
  • WHITENS - after 2 weeks of use, the teeth become visibly whiter and shiny. Does not contain chemical bleaches. Pineapple plant enzymes help break down and remove surface discoloration for whiter, brighter teeth.

🛒 Accede a la oferta!!
